synergies.Bastion + Sigma: Experimental Barrier gives Bastion a shielded position to safely enter Configuration: Assault from, and Accretion's knockdown keeps enemies from immediately punishing him for standing still. In return, Bastion's sustained fire covers Sigma while he repositions the barrier for the next engagement.
synergies.Bastion + Orisa: Fortify and Energy Javelin hold the frontline and control space, giving Bastion the safety to transform into Configuration: Assault without immediate pressure, and Terra Surge often groups enemies into a cluster his minigun can shred. Bastion's damage in turn covers Orisa while she repositions Javelin Spin to clear incoming fire.
synergies.Cassidy + Mercy: Mercy's damage-boost beam turns Peacekeeper and Deadeye into significantly harder-hitting threats, letting a boosted Deadeye clear a team before they can react. Her Resurrect also gives Cassidy room to play aggressively with Combat Roll, knowing a risky flank isn't necessarily a permanent loss.
synergies.Cassidy + Zenyatta: Orb of Discord amplifies damage on a priority target by 30%, which lets Peacekeeper shots or Deadeye finish them off far faster than usual. Orb of Harmony also sustains Cassidy through skirmishes so he can hold an aggressive position longer.
synergies.Echo + Mercy: Mercy's damage boost applied to Tri-Shot or Focusing Beam turns Echo's already-strong execute damage into an even faster kill on low-health targets, and her healing keeps Echo alive during the aerial engagements Flight puts her into. Guardian Angel also lets Mercy follow Echo's dives at a safe distance to keep the boost active.
synergies.Echo + Winston: Jump Pack and Primal Rage create chaos and draw attention away from Echo's Flight approach, letting her slip in from an angle and land Focusing Beam on a distracted target. Barrier Projector also gives Echo a safe space to retreat into if her dive draws too much heat.
synergies.Emre + Mercy: Mercy's damage-boost beam makes Synthetic Burst Rifle and Cyber Frag hit noticeably harder in extended trades, and her healing offsets the exposure Emre's mid-range playstyle invites. Guardian Angel also lets her stay close enough to keep the boost active during his repositioning with Siphon Blaster.
synergies.Emre + Zenyatta: Orb of Discord makes Emre's burst rifle and Cyber Frag deal significantly more damage to a marked target, letting him burn through priority targets faster than his kit alone would allow. Orb of Harmony also keeps him sustained through the mid-range trades his kit is built around.
synergies.Emre + Sigma: Experimental Barrier and Accretion control space and knock enemies down, giving Emre a safe window to land Cyber Frag or burst rifle damage on an exposed target. Kinetic Grasp also absorbs incoming fire that might otherwise punish Emre's mid-range positioning.
synergies.Freja + Mercy: Mercy's damage boost turns Take Aim into an even harder-hitting pick, and her healing lets Freja commit fully to Updraft and Quick Dash without worrying about chip damage catching up to her. Guardian Angel also gives Mercy the mobility to stay near Freja's aggressive high-ground positioning.
synergies.Freja + Sigma: Accretion knocks enemies into the open, giving Freja a clean Take Aim shot on an exposed target, and Experimental Barrier gives her cover to reposition between shots. Updraft also lets Freja take angles that support Sigma's own space control from above.
synergies.Genji + Kiriko: Swift Step can instantly reposition Kiriko to back up Genji the moment a dive with Swift Strike goes wrong, and Protection Suzu cleanses crowd control that would otherwise interrupt his Dragonblade combo. Her Kunai also punishes anyone who turns to focus him mid-engage.
synergies.Echo + Pharah: Concussive Blast and rocket splash can scatter groups into the open, giving Focusing Beam easy execute targets once they're below half health, and both share strong aerial mobility that lets them coordinate a dive from angles ground-based heroes can't easily punish. Echo's Duplicate can also copy Pharah mid-fight to add a second Barrage to the mix.
synergies.Ashe + Illari: Captive Sun slows and bursts enemies caught in its area, setting up easy follow-up kills for Ashe's precise Viper shots or a well-placed Dynamite, and Healing Pylon keeps Ashe topped up while holding an aggressive sniping angle. B.O.B. also helps clear space for Illari to reposition her pylon safely.
synergies.Echo + Jetpack Cat: Permanent flight and Purr healing keep Echo sustained during extended aerial engagements, letting her stay in Flight longer to look for Focusing Beam picks. Lifeline can also tow Echo to safety if a dive goes wrong, something few other supports can offer an airborne flanker.
synergies.Genji + Juno: Glide Boost and Pulsar Torpedoes let Juno keep pace with Genji's aerial mobility, healing him through his double jumps and wall climbs, and Hyper Ring gives him a speed boost to chase down a target after Swift Strike resets. Orbital Ray also heals Genji while he's mid-combo against a cluster of enemies.
synergies.Genji + Lúcio: Speed Song lets Genji close distance even faster to line up Swift Strike, and Sound Barrier's overhealth gives him the cushion to survive retaliation after diving into Dragonblade. Lúcio's own Wall Ride mobility also lets him stay close enough to keep healing Genji through an extended flank.
synergies.Genji + Mizuki: Healing Kasa bounces between allies to keep Genji topped up during aggressive flanks, and Binding Chain can lock down a target right as he closes in with Swift Strike, denying them any chance to escape. Kekkai Sanctuary also gives Genji a safe zone to retreat into if a dive doesn't pay off.
synergies.Genji + Zenyatta: Orb of Discord marks a target for 30% more damage, which turns Swift Strike and Dragonblade into a near-guaranteed kill, and Orb of Harmony sustains Genji through the trades his aggressive playstyle invites. It's a classic pairing precisely because Genji converts Zenyatta's damage amplification into immediate picks.
synergies.Zarya + Zenyatta: Orb of Discord amplifies damage on a target Zarya has already bubbled and charged her Particle Cannon against, turning her beam into an even faster kill, and Orb of Harmony offsets the health Zarya sacrifices for barrier uptime. Graviton Surge also clusters enemies for Zenyatta's own Orb of Destruction volley to hit multiple targets at once.
synergies.Winston + Zenyatta: Jump Pack and Barrier Projector create the frontline disruption that lets Zenyatta safely land Orb of Discord on a priority target from a protected position, and Orb of Harmony keeps Winston sustained through his aggressive dives. Primal Rage also creates the chaos Zenyatta needs to land Transcendence's healing without being immediately punished for the exposure.
synergies.Mei + Ramattra: Mei's Ice Wall can section off part of the enemy team, letting Ramattra's Nemesis Form punch through the isolated portion while his own Void Barrier covers the follow-up. Ravenous Vortex's pull combines with Mei's slow to keep enemies locked in place for a joint pick. Together they turn a single chokepoint into a near-guaranteed elimination.
synergies.Mei + Reinhardt: Reinhardt's Barrier Field creates a safe space for Mei to land Endothermic Blaster hits and freeze anyone who gets too close, while her Ice Wall can extend his coverage or trap enemies against it. Once Mei freezes a target, Charge or Fire Strike punishes them for free, and Blizzard adds team-wide area control on top. It's a wall-and-hammer combination where neither hero has to expose themselves to make the pick.
synergies.Reaper + Reinhardt: Reinhardt's Barrier Field gives Reaper cover to approach unseen, and once Earthshatter knocks enemies down, Reaper can walk into Death Blossom range and finish the fight before anyone stands back up. The Reaping's lifesteal also keeps Reaper topped up while both brawl at the range Reinhardt's kit wants to fight at. His hammer swings clear a path that Reaper's shotguns are perfectly suited to punish.
synergies.Mei + Roadhog: Chain Hook pulls an isolated target directly into Mei's freezing range, letting her lock them down completely while Roadhog's Scrap Gun finishes the kill. Mei's Ice Wall can also separate a hooked target from their team so no one can peel in time. Together they turn any single hook into a near-guaranteed elimination.
synergies.Sombra + Winston: Jump Pack dives the backline and forces enemies to scatter, and Sombra's Hack and Translocator let her follow him in to disable supports right as Winston applies pressure. Her Stealth also lets her set up ahead of his dive so both arrive on target together. Between his Barrier Projector and her EMP, the pair can strip a backline's defenses and sustain in the same engagement.
synergies.Sombra + Wrecking Ball: Grappling Claw and Roll disrupt the enemy team's positioning, scattering them into the open where Sombra's EMP or Hack can pick off isolated targets before they regroup. Piledriver launches enemies upward, denying their footing right as she closes for the kill. Together they create chaos neither hero could manufacture alone.
synergies.Hanzo + Zarya: Graviton Surge clusters enemies together, and Hanzo's Dragonstrike or a fully charged Storm Bow shot into the grouped target turns that pull into devastating follow-up damage. Particle Barrier can also protect him briefly while he lines up the shot. It's a classic bunch-and-burst pairing where her ultimate creates the opening his damage capitalizes on.
synergies.Reaper + Zarya: Graviton Surge bunches enemies into a tight cluster, and Reaper's Death Blossom deals area damage that thrives against grouped targets in exactly that scenario. Projected Barrier can also shield him as he closes the distance to get in range. The pairing turns her pick-setup ultimate into a near-guaranteed team wipe.
synergies.Hanzo + Kiriko: Swift Step lets Kiriko follow Hanzo onto high ground quickly to keep him topped up with Healing Ofuda, letting him hold sniping angles longer than he could alone. Protection Suzu also cleanses crowd control that would otherwise interrupt his draw, and Kitsune Rush speeds up his repositioning between angles. Together they keep a duelist safely fed from a flank support could otherwise struggle to reach.
synergies.Junkrat + Orisa: Energy Javelin and Fortify let Orisa hold a chokepoint while Junkrat lobs Frag Launcher grenades over her from safety, since his arcing projectiles don't need the direct sightline most damage does. Javelin Spin can also clear enemy projectiles that would otherwise punish him for staying exposed. Steel Trap adds another layer of area denial around the point she's already controlling.
synergies.Junkrat + Mei: Ice Wall can trap enemies in a confined space, and Junkrat's Frag Launcher and Concussion Mine both do heavy splash damage that thrives against anyone stuck without an escape route. RIP-Tire also becomes far more dangerous when Mei's wall prevents enemies from simply walking away from it. Between them, a single choke becomes a killzone neither hero could create alone.
synergies.Pharah + Zarya: Particle Barrier and Projected Barrier can shield Pharah from ground fire while she lines up Barrage from the air, and Graviton Surge groups enemies into a cluster that Barrage's splash damage devastates. Pharah's aerial position also keeps her safely out of the beam-range trades Zarya sometimes struggles with alone. One ultimate sets up the other's payoff perfectly.
synergies.Shion + Winston: Jump Pack and Barrier Projector create chaos and cover in the backline, and Shion's Evade and Joyride let her slip into the same space to land Execution volleys on scattered supports. Primal Rage also draws attention away from her flank, giving Shion room to clean up whoever survives. Together they overwhelm a backline from two directions at once.
synergies.Sierra + Zenyatta: Orb of Discord marks a target for 30% increased damage, and Sierra's Tracking Shot combined with her ramping Helix Rifle accuracy punishes that same target especially hard over a sustained engagement. Orb of Harmony can also keep Sierra topped up while she holds an angle. The pairing turns Zenyatta's damage amplification into consistent, precise follow-up.
synergies.Sierra + Sigma: Experimental Barrier and Accretion control space and knock enemies into the open, where Sierra's Tracking Shot and accurate sustained fire can immediately punish them. Kinetic Grasp also absorbs incoming pressure that would otherwise force her off her angle. Together they turn Sigma's space control into clean, repeatable picks.
synergies.Sojourn + Zenyatta: Orb of Discord amplifies damage on a target by 30%, and Sojourn's charged Railgun secondary fire capitalizes on that amplification for near-instant burst kills. Orb of Harmony also sustains her through mid-range trades while she builds energy. The combination turns her already-threatening rail shot into an even faster pick.
synergies.Soldier: 76 + Zenyatta: Orb of Discord makes Soldier: 76's already-consistent Heavy Pulse Rifle damage even more lethal, letting Tactical Visor secure eliminations faster than usual. Orb of Harmony's passive healing also keeps him topped up during extended firefights, reducing his need to fall back on Biotic Field. Together they turn steady damage into fast, reliable picks.
synergies.Sombra + Tracer: Both heroes thrive on flanking, and Sombra's Hack disables an enemy's escape or defensive cooldown right as Tracer's Blink brings her into range to punish them. Translocator and Recall let each hero reset a bad engagement independently, so the duo can dive repeatedly without needing backup. Sombra's Stealth can also scout a flank route that Tracer then exploits at full speed.
synergies.Mei + Symmetra: Symmetra's Teleporter lets the team bypass a chokepoint that Mei's Ice Wall is simultaneously sealing off from the enemy, creating a one-way flow of pressure. Her Sentry Turrets also punish anyone Mei manages to slow or wall off from retreating. Together they turn static defense into an area the enemy can't safely approach or escape.
synergies.Mei + Moira: Biotic Grasp keeps Mei topped up in extended trades, and Fade lets Moira safely reposition after using Biotic Orb to support Mei's pushes into a frozen or walled-off pick. Mei's Ice Wall can also protect Moira from retaliation while she channels Coalescence. The pairing lets Mei play aggressively knowing sustain is always close by.
synergies.Reaper + Zenyatta: Orb of Discord amplifies damage on Reaper's target, letting his already-devastating Hellfire Shotguns burst even faster at close range, and Orb of Harmony keeps him topped up between engagements alongside The Reaping's lifesteal. Reaper's Wraith Form also lets him safely reach the target Zenyatta has marked without dying on approach. Together they turn Reaper's already-high burst into near-instant eliminations.
synergies.Ana + D.Va: Ana's Nano Boost turns D.Va's Boosters engage into a genuine kill threat, giving her the damage output and resistance to survive a dive she'd otherwise have to bail out of. Biotic Grenade's healing also keeps D.Va topped up through the sustained pellet trades her Fusion Cannons invite. Together they let D.Va commit to fights she'd normally need to play more cautiously.
synergies.Baptiste + Domina: Amplification Matrix set up behind Domina doubles the damage of her Photon Magnum beam and Crystal Charge detonations, letting her poke and burst through enemy lines far faster than usual. Baptiste's Regenerative Burst and Immortality Field also let her hold an aggressive Barrier Array position without fear of being punished for it. The pairing turns Domina's controlled poke into a genuine breakthrough tool.
synergies.Baptiste + Mauga: Baptiste's Immortality Field gives Mauga the confidence to commit fully to Cage Fight without the usual risk of a team wipe if the engage goes wrong. Amplification Matrix also doubles the output of his chainguns, letting him shred through anyone caught in the arena. The combination turns Mauga's already-aggressive playstyle into a near-unpunishable all-in.
synergies.Baptiste + Orisa: Amplification Matrix doubles the damage of Orisa's Augmented Fusion Driver and Energy Javelin, turning her steady poke into serious burst pressure. Immortality Field then lets her hold forward positions and eat Fortify cooldowns without a bad trade ending in a death. Together they let Orisa anchor pushes far more aggressively than she could alone.
synergies.Illari + Orisa: Orisa's Energy Javelin and Terra Surge group enemies together, handing Illari a cluster of exposed targets for her Captive Sun to detonate on. Illari's Solar Rifle can also pick off anyone Orisa's knockback separates from the group before they can recover. The pairing turns Orisa's crowd control into guaranteed follow-up value.
synergies.Baptiste + Reinhardt: Reinhardt's Barrier Field gives Baptiste the cover he needs to safely set up Immortality Field and land healing grenades without getting picked. In return, Amplification Matrix placed behind the shield turns every Fire Strike Reinhardt throws into doubled damage, making his poke genuinely threatening instead of just chip. The two form a durable frontline that can both protect and punish.
synergies.Ana + Roadhog: Nano Boost turns Roadhog's Chain Hook into a near-guaranteed kill, since the damage boost and resistance let him follow up on the hook and survive any retaliation while doing it. Biotic Grenade's healing also keeps him topped up as he tanks damage to create space. The combination lets Roadhog play far more aggressively than his kit alone would allow.
synergies.Baptiste + Sigma: Amplification Matrix massively increases the damage of Sigma's Hyperspheres and Accretion, turning his usual poke into serious burst that can finish fights outright. Baptiste's Immortality Field also covers Sigma while he repositions Experimental Barrier, since that process leaves him briefly exposed. Together they let Sigma control space more aggressively without sacrificing survivability.
synergies.Tracer + Winston: Winston's Jump Pack dives draw attention and force cooldowns, creating exactly the chaos Tracer thrives in as she blinks past the distracted frontline to finish off exposed backline targets. His Barrier Projector also gives her a safe point to retreat to if her flank goes wrong. The pairing lets both heroes pressure the same isolated targets from different angles at once.
synergies.Ana + Winston: Nano Boost gives Winston the survivability and damage output to fully commit to a Jump Pack dive he might otherwise lose, letting him tank return fire while his Tesla Cannon shreds through a clustered backline. Ana's Biotic Grenade can also follow him in to sustain the engage. Together they turn Winston's usual disruption dive into a genuine kill threat.
synergies.Tracer + Wrecking Ball: Wrecking Ball's Piledriver and Grappling Claw scatter and isolate enemies, launching them into the air away from their support — exactly the kind of separated target Tracer's Blink and Pulse Pistols are built to finish. Neither hero needs the other to set up peel, since Wrecking Ball's own Adaptive Shield covers his own dive while Tracer cleans up. The two create constant chaos that's hard for a backline to recover from.
synergies.Baptiste + Bastion: Amplification Matrix set up in front of Bastion multiplies the already-massive damage of Configuration: Assault, letting a single burst delete anyone caught in its path. Baptiste's healing also sustains Bastion through the vulnerable moments when he's transforming or reloading. The pairing turns Bastion's raw damage into an almost unanswerable choke-point lockdown.
synergies.Ana + Cassidy: Nano Boost supercharges Cassidy's Deadeye or a well-placed Peacekeeper shot, giving him the damage and survivability to secure kills that would otherwise require a follow-up. Ana's Sleep Dart can also set up an easy Combat Roll finish on a target he's already engaged. Together they turn Cassidy's burst potential into a much more reliable pick.
synergies.Baptiste + Cassidy: Amplification Matrix doubles the damage of Cassidy's Peacekeeper shots or a charging Deadeye, letting him one-shot targets that would normally take two hits. This lets Cassidy play from further back and still secure eliminations through the matrix rather than needing to fully commit. The synergy turns his already-strong burst into near-instant picks.
synergies.Ana + Echo: Nano Boost amplifies Echo's Focusing Beam execute damage and Sticky Bombs burst, letting her finish off low-health targets faster than her kit alone allows. The added damage resistance also lets Echo commit to Flight dives she'd otherwise need to play more cautiously. Together they turn Echo's finishing power into something much harder to escape.
synergies.Baptiste + Emre: Amplification Matrix doubles the output of Emre's burst rifle and Cyber Frag, turning his already-reliable mid-range pressure into serious burst damage. Baptiste's Immortality Field also lets Emre push aggressively during Override Protocol without fearing a bad trade will end in a death. The pairing lets Emre commit to fights with far less risk.
synergies.Baptiste + Freja: Amplification Matrix doubles the damage of Freja's charged Take Aim shot, turning her already-precise pick potential into a near-guaranteed elimination on anything she lines up. Baptiste's healing also keeps her topped up while she repositions with Quick Dash and Updraft between shots. The combination makes Freja's poke damage lethal rather than just threatening.
synergies.Ana + Genji: Nano Boost turns Genji's Dragonblade into an almost unstoppable kill window, since the added damage resistance lets him tank retaliation while slashing through a backline that would otherwise punish the dive. Ana's Biotic Grenade can also sustain him through any chip damage he takes closing the distance. Together they make Genji's ultimate far scarier than it is alone.
synergies.Ana + Hanzo: Nano Boost amplifies Hanzo's Storm Arrows or a fully charged shot into a near-guaranteed elimination, letting him punish targets that would normally survive the hit. Ana's Sleep Dart can also set up a free, uncontested headshot on a target he's tracking. The pairing turns Hanzo's already-high burst potential into something closer to a sure thing.
synergies.Ana + Junkrat: Ana's Biotic Grenade denies enemy healing right as Junkrat's Frag Launcher spam or RIP-Tire detonation lands, turning what would just be chip damage into a clean kill. Nano Boost also lets him tank return fire while lining up traps or detonating mines in the open. Together they convert Junkrat's area denial into reliable eliminations.
synergies.Baptiste + Sierra: Amplification Matrix doubles the output of Sierra's Helix Rifle once it ramps up accuracy, and Tremor Charge's explosion becomes considerably more threatening passing through it as well. Baptiste's healing also lets her hold an aggressive Tracking Shot position without worrying about the trade. The combination turns Sierra's already-consistent pressure into serious burst.
synergies.Baptiste + Sojourn: Amplification Matrix massively increases the damage of Sojourn's charged Railgun shot, turning her already-lethal burst into a near-instant elimination on anything she targets. Immortality Field also covers her while she repositions with Power Slide between engagements. The pairing lets Sojourn play more aggressively without sacrificing her usual pick potential.
synergies.Baptiste + Soldier: 76: Amplification Matrix doubles the damage of 76's Helix Rockets and sustained Heavy Pulse Rifle fire, giving him far more burst than his kit alone provides. His own Biotic Field pairs naturally with Baptiste's healing grenades to keep the pair topped up through extended firefights. Together they let 76 hold an aggressive push far longer than usual.
synergies.Ana + Sombra: Sleep Dart is much easier to land safely on a target Sombra has already Hacked, since their escape and cleanse options are locked out, guaranteeing the pick sticks. Biotic Grenade's anti-heal also reinforces the burst damage Sombra's Virus applies during and after an EMP. Together they turn Sombra's disruption into confirmed eliminations rather than just openings.
synergies.Baptiste + Symmetra: Amplification Matrix doubles the damage of Symmetra's ramping Photon Projector beam and her charged orb shots, letting her melt through shields and tanks far faster than she could alone. Baptiste's healing also sustains her while she holds a beam on target through return fire. The pairing turns Symmetra's slow-building damage into serious burst potential.
synergies.Baptiste + Torbjörn: Amplification Matrix doubles the output of both Torbjörn's turret and his Rivet Gun, turning an already-strong area denial setup into an overwhelming choke-point lockdown. Baptiste's healing also keeps Torbjörn alive while he holds position defending both the turret and the matrix itself. Together they can shut down an entire approach lane.
synergies.Vendetta + Zarya: Zarya's Graviton Surge clusters enemies together and strips their mobility, handing Vendetta a group of grouped targets for Sundering Blade or Whirlwind Dash to cut through in a single pass. Zarya's barriers also soak up incoming fire while Vendetta closes the distance to capitalize. The combination turns crowd control into a guaranteed multi-kill opportunity.
synergies.Venture + Winston: Both heroes thrive on disruption — Winston's Jump Pack and Barrier Projector create chaos and cover in the backline, while Venture's Burrow follows up on the same isolated targets without either needing to provide peel for the other. Their mobility overlaps well enough that neither is left exposed while diving together. The result is near-constant pressure on a backline that has no safe angle to retreat to.
synergies.Baptiste + Widowmaker: Amplification Matrix set up along one of Widowmaker's sniping angles doubles her already-lethal scoped headshot damage, letting her one-shot targets that would otherwise survive the hit. Baptiste's Immortality Field also covers her exposed position if she gets dove while lining up a shot. Together they turn Widowmaker's picks into an even more consistent threat.
synergies.Widowmaker + Zenyatta: Zenyatta's Orb of Discord marks a target for 30% increased damage, which stacks directly with Widowmaker's one-shot headshot potential — a Discorded target can die to a body shot that would otherwise just be a heavy poke. Zenyatta's Orb of Harmony also keeps her topped up while she holds a distant angle. The pairing turns Widowmaker's picks into a near-certainty on marked targets.
synergies.Ana + Reinhardt: Nano Boost lets Reinhardt survive and push through a fight he'd otherwise have to disengage from, giving him the damage resistance to hold Barrier Field or land Charge even after it starts cracking. Biotic Grenade's healing also keeps him topped up while he tanks sustained chip damage at the front. Together they let Reinhardt anchor a push far more aggressively than his kit alone supports.
synergies.Ana + Reaper: Nano Boost turns Reaper's already-lethal Death Blossom or point-blank shotgun burst into a near-unkillable engage, since the damage resistance lets him walk through retaliation he'd normally have to avoid. Biotic Grenade's healing can also sustain him mid-Wraith Form transition. The combination makes Reaper's all-in commitment far safer than it looks.
synergies.Ana + Doomfist: Nano Boost gives Doomfist the survivability to fully commit to a Rocket Punch into Seismic Slam combo, letting him tank the retaliation that would normally punish such an aggressive engage. Biotic Grenade can also sustain him through the damage he takes closing the distance. Together they turn Doomfist's all-in dive into a genuine win condition rather than a gamble.
synergies.Brigitte + Reinhardt: Brigitte's Repair Pack and Rally overhealth keep Reinhardt topped up while he holds Barrier Field under sustained fire, letting him anchor the frontline far longer than he could alone. Her Shield Bash also punishes anyone who dives him the moment his barrier finally breaks. The pairing gives Reinhardt both the sustain and the protection to hold ground indefinitely.
synergies.Brigitte + Zarya: Rally's overhealth stacks on top of Zarya's barriers to make both heroes extremely difficult to burst down during a coordinated push. Brigitte's Shield Bash can also interrupt anyone trying to focus Zarya down before her energy builds toward a fully charged beam. Together they let Zarya play far more aggressively without fear of losing the trade.
synergies.Brigitte + Ramattra: Brigitte's Inspire passive and Repair Pack keep Ramattra topped up while he tanks damage in Nemesis Form, letting him hold that transformation longer than he could sustain alone. Shield Bash also punishes anyone trying to flank him while he's committed to the punching stance. The pairing turns Ramattra's heaviest form into a genuinely durable frontline threat.
synergies.Brigitte + Lúcio: Inspire's passive melee healing and Lúcio's Heal Song stack to keep the frontline topped up far beyond what either could sustain alone, covering more of the team at once. Lúcio's Speed Song also lets Brigitte close distance faster to land Shield Bash or Whip Shot before enemies can react. Together they form one of the most durable sustain cores available.
synergies.Illari + Sigma: Sigma's Experimental Barrier and Accretion control sightlines and knock enemies down, setting up clean targets for Illari's Solar Rifle or Captive Sun to finish off. Illari's healing beam also keeps Sigma topped up as he holds forward positions with Kinetic Grasp absorbing incoming fire. The combination lets Sigma play aggressively while Illari cleans up whatever he exposes.
synergies.Illari + Widowmaker: Illari's Solar Rifle can pick off anyone who reveals themselves trying to flank Widowmaker's sniping angle, giving Widow the freedom to hold an exposed position without constantly rotating for safety. Healing Pylon also lets her top up passively rather than retreating for support. Together they let Widowmaker commit fully to a single powerful angle.
synergies.Jetpack Cat + Pharah: Jetpack Cat's permanent flight lets them stay airborne alongside Pharah, healing her mid-hover with Biotic Pawjectiles rather than losing contact whenever she gains altitude. Lifeline can also tow her to safety instantly if she's caught out of position after a Barrage. The pairing keeps Pharah sustained and mobile in a way ground-based supports simply can't match.
synergies.Jetpack Cat + Soldier: 76: Jetpack Cat's Lifeline can tow a wounded 76 clear after an aggressive Tactical Visor push goes wrong, turning what would be a death into a safe retreat. Purr's area healing also sustains him through prolonged firefights where his own Biotic Field isn't enough. Together they let 76 push further than he'd normally dare to alone.
synergies.Juno + Reinhardt: Juno's Hyper Ring speed boost lets Reinhardt close distance faster to land Charge or Fire Strike before enemies can react, turning his usual telegraphed engage into a much quicker threat. Her aerial healing also keeps him topped up even while he's fully committed to holding Barrier Field. The pairing gives Reinhardt both speed and sustain he doesn't normally have.
synergies.Juno + Tracer: Juno's Hyper Ring and torpedo healing let Tracer chain repeated Blink dives without worrying about her thin health pool, since Juno can patch her back up quickly between engagements. This lets Tracer play far more recklessly than she otherwise could, testing angles she'd normally have to play around. The two form a highly mobile pairing that can pressure a backline continuously.
synergies.Juno + Lúcio: Both are speed-oriented healers whose mobility tools — Hyper Ring and Speed Song — stack to let the whole team rotate and push objectives faster than almost any other composition. Their healing also overlaps to cover more ground at once, since both can heal on the move rather than needing to stand still. Together they turn a team fight into a series of fast, coordinated pushes.
synergies.Baptiste + Lifeweaver: Baptiste's Immortality Field covers Lifeweaver while he sets up Tree of Life or throws Petal Platforms from an exposed position, since he has little personal defense otherwise. Combined, their healing output — Regenerative Burst alongside Healing Blossom — can out-heal focused damage on a single target that either alone might lose. The pairing creates one of the most resilient support cores in the game.
synergies.Kiriko + Mauga: Mauga throws himself into the enemy team with Overrun or holds ground with Cage Fight, and Kiriko's Swift Step lets her instantly follow him into that chaos to keep Healing Ofuda locked on, sustaining him through the brawl his own Cardiac Overdrive already boosts. Protection Suzu also cleanses him and grants a burst of invulnerability right as the engagement peaks, covering the exact moment he's most exposed.
synergies.Lúcio + Ramattra: Ramattra's slow advance behind Void Barrier becomes far more threatening with Lúcio's Speed Song closing the distance faster during his Nemesis Form punch windows, and Crossfade's passive healing offsets the chip damage he takes poking forward. Soundwave can also blast divers off Ramattra the moment Nemesis Form ends and he's briefly vulnerable.
synergies.Kiriko + Ramattra: Kiriko's Swift Step lets her stay glued to Ramattra as he pushes forward in Nemesis Form, keeping Healing Ofuda on him through the punches he's trading, and Protection Suzu covers the vulnerable window right after the transformation ends when he's lost his bonus armour.
synergies.Lúcio + Reinhardt: Speed Song lets Reinhardt's team close the gap behind Barrier Field far faster than they could on foot, and Amp It Up's healing burst offsets the chip damage he absorbs while holding the shield. Soundwave can also knock enemies away the instant his barrier breaks or divers slip around it to flank him.
synergies.Kiriko + Roadhog: Roadhog's Chain Hook drags a single target deep into danger, and Kiriko's Swift Step lets her instantly reach whoever he's about to follow up on, either healing them through the burst or throwing Protection Suzu to save them outright before the Scrap Gun connects.
synergies.Kiriko + Winston: Winston's Jump Pack commits him alone into the backline, and Kiriko's Swift Step follows him in immediately to keep Healing Ofuda flowing, while Protection Suzu clears any crowd control that would otherwise interrupt his Primal Rage or bubble timing at the worst moment.
synergies.Lúcio + Zarya: Zarya wants to keep throwing Particle Barrier and Projected Barrier to build energy for her beam, and Lúcio's Heal Song keeps her topped up so she never has to retreat instead of shielding, while Speed Song gets him to a threatened ally fast enough to bubble them in time.
synergies.Lúcio + Mei: Mei's Ice Wall splits the enemy team or traps them in a choke point, and Lúcio's Soundwave can immediately knock the isolated side further away or off a ledge, with his Speed Song letting his team capitalize on the split before the wall breaks.
synergies.Mercy + Pharah: This is the archetypal dive-support pairing — Mercy's Guardian Angel lets her match Pharah's altitude to keep a healing tether or Damage Boost locked on, and boosted rocket splash damage lets Pharah delete targets other supports could never reach in the air. Mercy staying airborne beside her also keeps both of them safer from ground-based threats than either would be alone.
synergies.Kiriko + Reaper: Reaper is defenseless the instant Wraith Form ends, since he can't fire during it, and Kiriko's Swift Step lets her stick to his flanks to keep him topped up through Hellfire Shotgun trades. Protection Suzu also cleanses and shields him right as the invulnerability window closes, covering his single weakest moment.
synergies.Lúcio + Reaper: Reaper wants to commit fully to a close-range shotgun trade, and Lúcio's Heal Song sustains him through it while Soundwave can knock away anyone trying to punish the vulnerable second after Wraith Form ends.
synergies.Kiriko + Shion: Shion's Evade dash grants brief overhealth for an aggressive flank, and Kiriko's Swift Step lets her follow that flank into the backline instantly, topping Shion off with Healing Ofuda or throwing Suzu the moment the engagement turns against her.
synergies.Lúcio + Shion: Shion's Joyride and Execution combos want an extended brawl once she's committed to a flank, and Lúcio's Speed Song gets her into position faster while Heal Song keeps her alive through the drawn-out fight that follows.
synergies.Mercy + Sierra: Sierra's Anchor Drone gives her fast repositioning to contest angles, which pairs naturally with Mercy's own Guardian Angel mobility to stay close, and Damage Boost turns Sierra's already-ramping Helix Rifle accuracy into significantly higher sustained damage once she's locked onto a target.
synergies.Mercy + Sojourn: Sojourn's Railgun rewards sustained fire that builds toward a charged rail shot, and Mercy's Damage Boost makes both the primary fire and that charged shot hit dramatically harder, turning what's already a threatening pick into a near-guaranteed elimination.
synergies.Kiriko + Sojourn: Sojourn's Power Slide keeps her constantly repositioning, which suits Kiriko's own mobile healing style — Swift Step lets her stay attached through Sojourn's aggressive pushes, and Protection Suzu covers her the instant a dive punishes that forward positioning.
synergies.Mercy + Soldier: 76: Tactical Visor rewards Soldier: 76 for simply staying alive and holding line of sight on targets, and Mercy's Damage Boost dramatically raises the value of every automatically-aimed shot fired during it, while his own Biotic Field sustain means she rarely has to fully commit her staff to keeping him topped up.
synergies.Lifeweaver + Symmetra: Symmetra's Teleporter is only useful as long as she survives to place and defend it, and Lifeweaver's Life Grip can instantly pull her out of a dive attempt, while Petal Platform helps her team reach the elevated angles her turrets and beam favour.
synergies.Kiriko + Tracer: Tracer's Blink-heavy flanks pair naturally with Kiriko's own mobility, since Swift Step lets her follow Tracer straight into the backline to keep her sustained, and Protection Suzu covers the moment right after Recall's brief invulnerability runs out.
synergies.Kiriko + Vendetta: Vendetta's Whirlwind Dash and Soaring Slice put her deep in enemy lines for extended duels, and Kiriko's Swift Step lets her reach Vendetta instantly to keep Healing Ofuda flowing through the exchange, while Suzu can cleanse and protect her if the duel turns against her.
synergies.Lúcio + Vendetta: Vendetta's aggressive sword duels reward sustained health during extended Warding Stance trades, and Lúcio's Heal Song plus Amp It Up's burst keeps her topped up through them, while Speed Song helps her close the distance for a Soaring Slice engage in the first place.
synergies.Kiriko + Venture: Venture's Burrow makes them briefly untargetable while repositioning into the backline, and Kiriko's Swift Step lets her arrive right as they emerge to sustain them through the ensuing scramble, with Suzu cleansing any crowd control that would otherwise interrupt their Drill Dash follow-up.
synergies.Lúcio + Venture: Venture's burrow-and-emerge engage wants to close the last stretch of distance quickly, and Lúcio's Speed Song helps cover that gap, while Heal Song keeps them alive through the close-range scramble that follows the ambush.
synergies.Mercy + Widowmaker: Widowmaker needs an uncontested sightline to land her one-shot, and Mercy's Damage Boost turns her already-lethal headshots into a near-guaranteed elimination on more targets than she could reliably one-shot alone, while Guardian Angel lets Mercy reposition to a nearby vantage point without ever exposing herself on the ground.
synergies.Lifeweaver + Pharah: Pharah's aerial positioning is normally hard for a grounded healer to reach, but Lifeweaver's Petal Platform can launch either of them up to matching heights, and Life Grip gives him a way to yank her back to safety mid-air if she's caught out by a burst of damage.
synergies.Lifeweaver + Sigma: Sigma wants to hold an exposed forward position to land Accretion and absorb shots with Kinetic Grasp, and Lifeweaver's Life Grip can pull him out of danger the instant that overextension goes wrong, while Petal Platform helps him reach the elevated ground his kit likes to fight from.
synergies.Lifeweaver + Widowmaker: Widowmaker's best sniping perches are often difficult for a support to reach on foot, but Petal Platform can launch her straight up to those angles, and Life Grip gives Lifeweaver an instant way to save her the moment a flanker gets past her Venom Mine.
synergies.Lúcio + Tracer: Tracer's Blink-based flanks are hard for most healers to keep pace with, but Lúcio's Wall Ride lets him stay close enough to sustain her with Heal Song regardless, and Speed Song matches her tempo so their dives stay coordinated instead of leaving her isolated.
synergies.Mizuki + Reinhardt: Reinhardt's slow shield advance benefits from Guardian Wave, which amplifies healing received by allies caught in it while shoving back anyone threatening his flank, and Healing Kasa's multi-target bounce keeps his health topped up as he soaks poke behind Barrier Field.
synergies.Mizuki + Winston: Winston's dive commits him deep into the backline where he's isolated from support, and Mizuki's Katashiro Return gives her the mobility to follow his jump-ins and keep him alive with Healing Kasa, while Binding Chain can lock down whoever tries to punish him once his bubble drops.
synergies.Moira + Reinhardt: Reinhardt's shield-holding leaves him stationary and vulnerable to flanks, and Moira's Fade lets her dash in to punish anyone diving him while her Biotic Grasp keeps him topped up in quick close-range bursts without committing her for long. If a flank does get through, Fade also covers her own escape without dropping her healing output for long.
synergies.Moira + Zarya: Zarya's barriers soak damage to build energy for a devastating Particle Cannon beam, and Moira's healing keeps Zarya's team alive long enough for that energy to fully charge rather than forcing a retreat. Once Zarya lands Graviton Surge, Moira's own Coalescence beam can pour extra damage into the grouped enemies for a lethal follow-up.
